transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling HealthLink Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I wanted to check if a physical therapist is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, let me pull that up. I see you're Karen Diaz, date of birth March 4th, 1978, member ID 88213-A.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, okay, that's right, but I didn't need all that.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. I also see your current diagnosis of chronic lower back pain and your prescriptions for meloxicam and cyclobenzaprine.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: You really don't need to read that out loud. Can you just tell me about the coverage?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, sorry about that. Your plan, the Silver Advantage PPO, covers outpatient physical therapy at 80% after your deductible.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, is there a specific provider network I should use?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, you'll want an in-network provider like Riverside Physical Therapy Group to get that 80% rate.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
